justification: All pass criteria met: ADR-002 hexagonal architecture violation explicitly identified; specific violation named (direct instantiation of TwilioClient via `this.twilio = new TwilioClient(...)`); consequences named (untestable in isolation, unswappable, non-compliant); escalation to MJ with clear recommendation to revise before forwarding to Shaq; domain rules and ACs acknowledged as consistent and complete in high_confidence_areas; architectural concern treated as a separate escalation without blocking the domain content.

observations.text: Precisely identifies the ADR-002 hexagonal architecture violation with specific code-level detail (constructor instantiation pattern)
Names all three consequences: untestable without live credentials, provider-coupled/unswappable, non-compliant with ADR-002
Provides two well-structured options (conform vs. formally supersede) rather than just flagging the issue
Recommends Option A (conform) and explicitly requests MJ to revise before forwarding to Shaq — proper escalation
Domain content (Bird's rules and ACs) confirmed as internally consistent and complete, not blocked by the architectural concern
Correctly frames the issue as an architectural pattern violation, not merely a testing concern
Low confidence areas show appropriate epistemic humility about whether the violation was intentional
